commit.message:
Android app: full transport refactor + CI job

- Add AbstractTransport base class (app/AbstractTransport.h) — common
  signals/interface for SerialTransport (desktop) and the new
  AndroidSerialTransport (Android USB Host JNI)
- SerialTransport now inherits AbstractTransport (trivial, no behaviour change)
- DeviceBackend uses AbstractTransport*; conditionally creates
  SerialTransport or AndroidSerialTransport via #ifdef ANDROID_BUILD
- AndroidSerialTransport completely rewritten as a proper drop-in:
  same 4 Hz polling loop as SerialTransport but uses JNI bulkTransfer
  via UsbSerial.java instead of QSerialPort
- UsbSerial.java: add static wrapper methods (open/close/write/read)
  so C++ can call them without managing the singleton
- android/main.cpp: BackendFactory with switchToUsb/switchToRest,
  listUsbDevices() delegates to AndroidSerialTransport::listDevices()
- android/CMakeLists.txt: Java sources copied into android_package/src
  at configure time for androiddeployqt pickup
- CI: add build-android job (Ubuntu, NDK r26, API-34, Qt 6.9.2 arm64)
  producing OpenPS2000-android-arm64.apk artifact
- Desktop build verified clean

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: encoding preprocessor pipeline — base64, ROT13, leet, URL, homoglyph, spacing

Add 6 new normalization passes to the detection pipeline (8 total):
1. Whitespace normalize (existing)
2. Newline strip (existing)
3. URL decode (%20→space, %2F→/, etc.)
4. Leet speak normalize (1→i, 3→e, 4→a, 0→o, 5→s, 7→t, @→a)
5. Character spacing collapse ('i g n o r e' → 'ignore')
6. Base64 decode (detect 20+ char blobs, decode, scan decoded content)
7. ROT13 decode (rotate all letters by 13)
8. Homoglyph normalize (Cyrillic/Greek/fullwidth lookalikes → Latin)

Each pass runs detect_inner() independently and merges new pattern matches.
Passes are skipped when the variant equals a previous pass (no redundant work).

Results:
- Convergence audit: 91/91 (was 86/91)
- All 5 'known architectural limitations' are now fixed
- Property tests: 6/6 pass (no panics on fuzzed input with new preprocessors)
- Update low_security test: base64 with attack payload now correctly detected
  via decode → use benign base64 content instead

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: capture external command output before piping to Select-Object

Piping gh --version to Select-Object -First 1 terminates the pipeline
early, which kills the gh process and sets LASTEXITCODE=1 even when
gh is working fine. Fix: capture full output first, then format.

T03 was failing despite gh being installed and T04/T05 passing.
Same pattern fixed in T13 (was masked by the -or fallback).

feat: testing, lint fixes, comprehensive README, and v1.0.0 release (#78)

* test: increase coverage to 90%+ and fix all golangci-lint warnings

- Add additional tests for email and httpclient to reach 90%+
- Fix errorlint: use errors.Is instead of != for sentinel errors
- Fix errcheck: wrap resp.Body.Close() return values
- Fix staticcheck: De Morgan's law, remove Sprintf, empty branch, embedded field
- Fix unparam: mark unused ctx parameter with _
- Fix unused: remove rollbackFn field from mockTx
- Fix bodyclose: close response bodies in testkit tests
- Suppress gosec G404 for intentional jitter randomness

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* chore: remove temporary coverage HTML files

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* docs: comprehensive README with all package descriptions and usage examples

Add full documentation for all 32 packages including:
- auth/middleware (JWT, authorization, request handling)
- config (env var loading with defaults)
- database (PostgreSQL pool and transactions)
- validation (field-level validators)
- cache (generic LRU with TTL)
- retry (exponential backoff with jitter)
- crypto (bcrypt, tokens, HMAC-SHA256)
- email (SMTP mailer with HTML/text templates)
- tracing (OpenTelemetry setup and helpers)
- migration (SQL migration runner with rollback)
- All other packages (response, request, health, httpclient, apperror, etc.)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Jordan <devaloi@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: context-aware CLI hints across all scripts (#59)

All user-facing messages now detect COPILOT_BRIDGE_CLI env var and show
'copilot-bridge <cmd>' when running via npm global install, or
'npm run <cmd>' when running from source.

Fixed in: init.ts, check.ts, install-service.ts

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
